title: Erhu Bare-Bones Starter Packet
artifact_focus: L2 starter packet for qianjin-to-bridge measurement planning

cultural_provenance.claim: This explorer indexes an erhu-inspired prototype packet for measurement planning. It does not claim measured erhu craft authority, reviewed full-instrument CAD, or validated acoustic performance.

physical_design_anchors.authority_scope: setup strip only; body, bridge, membrane, string set, qianjin height, pegs, neck, and joinery remain TBD

required_before_public: Measure installed qianjin-to-bridge contact-point spans with photo evidence.
Record bridge height, mass, foot geometry, placement, and bowed response.
Record membrane material, tension method, humidity notes, and acoustic response.
Record installed string source, gauge or product ID, open-string pitch, and tuner/audio evidence.
Review resonator/body/neck/peg/joinery CAD or DXF before promoting any full-instrument fabrication geometry.
Keep Wolfram/OpenSCAD notes source-only unless runtime commands and outputs are committed.
Obtain erhu-specific measured reference, builder, teacher, or player review before public build guidance.

sources.title: Existing packet manifest
sources.credit: Repo-local L2 packet metadata and authority boundary

sources.title: Measurement plan
sources.credit: Contact-point measurement protocol and anti-overclaim checks
